headline: A Look At Rockwell Automation (ROK) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Why Rockwell Automation Is Back on Investors’ Radar Rockwell Automation (ROK) is drawing fresh attention after a period of mixed share performance, with a recent month gain following weaker returns over the past 3 months and the past week. See our latest analysis for Rockwell Automation. At a share price of $401.18, Rockwell Automation has recently combined a 14.1% 1 month share price return with a weaker 3 month share price return of 4.6%, while its 1 year total shareholder return of 64.0%...
